sections.paragraph:
αἰχμαλωτισμός, οῦ, ὁ (s. αἰχμάλωτος; Simplicius in Epict. p. 35, 31; schol. on Aristoph., Nub. 186) captivity (w. θάνατος) αἰ. ἑαυτῷ ἐπισπᾶσθαι bring captivity on oneself Hv 1, 1, 8.

Simplicius Simplicius , VI a.d.—List 5

Epict Epict , various works, I–II a.d.—List 5

schol. schol. = scholion, scholia, scholiast

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

Hv Hv = Visions

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 32
